text.title: Graph RAG in Production Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end with explicit decision-gates.

step.name: deploy-router
step.action: Wire ingress classifier (haiku); per query-type max-cost cap; 429 over cap.

step.name: provision-cache
step.action: Stand up redis/valkey; load summaries keyed by (community_id, index_version).
step.decision-gate: If hit-rate < 70% after warmup, audit key cardinality.

step.name: wire-delta-stream
step.action: Producer publishes doc inserts/deletes; consumer applies to staging graph + flips version.

step.name: observability
step.action: Emit per-query-type latency, cost, cache hit, error rate; alert webhook on SLO breach.
